education.title: What is an Organization?
education.description: An organization is your association, federation, or cooperative in the digital voting system.
education.point_1: Your member data is managed here
education.point_2: All elections take place within this organization
education.data_deletion: Deletion after election per GDPR Art. 17
education.requirements_intro: To represent your organization legally, we need:
education.req_name_desc: exactly as in the organization register

form.title: Create Organization
form.name_helper: exactly as in the organization register
form.step_1_info: After providing this information, we will ask for your organization's address and board chair.
form.country_info: Public Digit is currently focused on Germany
form.step_2_info: This address is used for legal service of documents and communication with authorities.
form.rep_email_helper: If different from the organization email
form.is_self_representative_help: Check this if you are the representative. No separate email will be sent.
form.gdpr_acceptance: I accept GDPR-compliant processing of my data
form.terms_acceptance: I accept the terms of service of Public Digit
form.step_3_info: After confirmation, you will receive a confirmation email. You can then invite members and create your first election.
